analysis.summary: Gitea is a self-hosted Git service platform that provides web-based Git repository hosting, issue tracking, pull requests, and collaboration features. It processes Git operations, serves a web interface, manages users and organizations, and integrates with external services for CI/CD and authentication.
capabilities: Hosts and manages Git repositories with web interface (cmd/web.go, routers/web/web.go)
Processes Git operations via SSH and HTTP protocols (cmd/serv.go, services/repository/)
Manages user authentication and authorization with multiple backends (services/auth/)
Provides issue tracking and project management (models/issues/, routers/web/repo/issue.go)
Handles pull requests and code review workflows (models/pull/, services/pull/)
Serves REST and GraphQL APIs for external integrations (routers/api/, routers/web/api/)
Processes webhook events and notifications (services/webhook/)
Manages organizations, teams, and user permissions (models/organization/, models/user/)
Provides CI/CD integration with Gitea Actions (services/actions/)
Handles package registry functionality (routers/api/packages/)
Processes markdown and other markup formats (modules/markup/)
Manages database migrations and administrative tasks (cmd/admin.go, cmd/migrate.go)
technical_stack: SQLite, PostgreSQL, MySQL, MSSQL database support (go.mod: xorm, database drivers)
Redis for caching and sessions (go.mod: github.com/redis/go-redis)
OAuth2 provider and client (go.mod: github.com/golang-jwt/jwt, golang.org/x/oauth2)

technical_facts: Hosts and manages Git repositories with web interface (cmd/web.go, routers/web/web.go)
Processes Git operations via SSH and HTTP protocols (cmd/serv.go, services/repository/)
Manages user authentication and authorization with multiple backends (services/auth/)
Provides issue tracking and project management (models/issues/, routers/web/repo/issue.go)
Handles pull requests and code review workflows (models/pull/, services/pull/)
Serves REST and GraphQL APIs for external integrations (routers/api/, routers/web/api/)
Processes webhook events and notifications (services/webhook/)
Manages organizations, teams, and user permissions (models/organization/, models/user/)
Provides CI/CD integration with Gitea Actions (services/actions/)
Handles package registry functionality (routers/api/packages/)

architecture_patterns: Concurrency: goroutines with context-based cancellation, background task queues, HTTP request pooling

functional_dna.logic_archetype_evidence: Gitea orchestrates complex workflows between Git operations, web interface, authentication, webhooks, CI/CD actions, and user management - maintaining state across repository data, user sessions, pull request workflows, and issue tracking (cmd/web.go, services/repository/, services/actions/, models/issues/)
functional_dna.data_contract_evidence: Uses XORM for structured database operations with defined models (models/issues/, models/pull/, models/user/), strict API schemas (routers/api/), and Git protocol compliance requirements
functional_dna.core_algorithmic_evidence: Git repository management inherently uses directed acyclic graphs for commit history, branch relationships, and merge operations (services/repository/, models/pull/), plus organizational hierarchies for users/teams/permissions
functional_dna.concurrency_evidence: Database operations using XORM with support for PostgreSQL/MySQL/MSSQL requiring transactional integrity for repository operations, user management, and issue tracking (go.mod: xorm, database drivers)
functional_dna.repurposing_reasoning: High reusability due to generic patterns: REST API framework, authentication systems, webhook processing, and workflow orchestration are broadly applicable. Git-specific components limit some use cases but core infrastructure is domain-agnostic.

evidence_claims.claim: Implements comprehensive authentication with multiple backends
evidence_claims.evidence: services/auth/, OAuth2 provider and client (go.mod: github.com/golang-jwt/jwt, golang.org/x/oauth2), LDAP authentication support (go.mod: github.com/go-ldap/ldap)

evidence_claims.claim: Provides REST API framework with routing
evidence_claims.evidence: Serves REST and GraphQL APIs for external integrations (routers/api/, routers/web/api/), github.com/go-chi/chi/v5 router dependency
Processes webhook events and notifications (services/webhook/), Discord/Slack/Teams webhook integrations listed
xorm.io/xorm dependency, SQLite, PostgreSQL, MySQL, MSSQL database support (go.mod: xorm, database drivers)
